samples.text: All salmon are fish. A shark is a fish. Is a shark a salmon?
Every member of salmon is among fish. A shark is a fish. Does it follow that a shark is a salmon?
All Atlantic salmon are aquatic vertebrates. A shark is an aquatic vertebrate. Is a shark an Atlantic salmon?
Being a fish does not by itself make something a salmon. A shark is a fish. Is a shark a salmon?
All salmon are fish. A shark is a fish. The weather today is cloudy. Is a shark a salmon?
